name: Docker Image Vulnerability Scan (Trivy)
description: Trivy scan of the built Docker image for HIGH and CRITICAL CVEs.
descriptionHtml: Trivy scan of the built Docker image for HIGH and CRITICAL CVEs.

testStage.description: Trivy scan of the built Docker image for HIGH and CRITICAL CVEs.

steps.name: HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs in Image
